ideal_answer_shape: Answer first, then strategy, evidence, limitations, safety markers, and run proof.
Expose source refs, line spans, hashes, freshness, and artifact page refs when evidence is too long for chat.
must_have_facts: Large-context usability is retrieval, chunking, summarization, artifact paging, evidence selection, and strategy routing.
Raw 1M-token prompting is not proven unless a dedicated raw-context proof gate passes.
Release-candidate replay must include gateway and AnythingLLM proof plus small-repo non-regression.
hard_failures: Leaks ignored, private, secret-like, or copied source text into chat or artifacts.
Accepts stale source hashes or stale index metadata.
Mutates protected frozen fixtures or generated corpus during live replay.

acceptance_marker: RELEASE CANDIDATE LARGE CONTEXT STRATEGY REPLAY PASS
